items.name: Health Potion
items.description: A red vial that restores 50 HP.

items.name: Mana Potion
items.description: A blue vial that restores 30 MP.

items.name: Antidote
items.description: Cures poison and other status ailments.

items.name: Iron Ore
items.description: Raw iron ore. Can be smelted into iron bars.

items.name: Wood Log
items.description: A sturdy log. Used in basic crafting.

items.name: Cloth Scrap
items.description: Rough fabric scraps useful for basic armor.

items.name: Iron Sword
items.description: A dependable iron sword. Not flashy, but reliable.

items.name: Leather Armor
items.description: Light armor made from tanned hide. Offers modest protection.

items.name: Iron Shield
items.description: A heavy shield that can absorb significant blows.

items.name: Amulet of Swiftness
items.description: A magical amulet that subtly quickens the wearer's step.

items.name: Golden Key
items.description: A heavy key stamped with an unfamiliar crest.

items.name: Rusty Coin
items.description: An old corroded coin. Worth almost nothing.

items.name: Ancient Amulet
items.description: You were asked to retrieve this. Don't lose it.
